query:
-- Check what BI001356 is
SELECT externalId, description, lineAmount, customerExternalId FROM billing_items WHERE externalId = 'BI001356';

-- Check what's already assigned to BI00018
SELECT sba.serviceExternalId, s.planName, s.monthlyCost 
FROM service_billing_assignments sba
JOIN services s ON s.externalId = sba.serviceExternalId
WHERE sba.billingItemExternalId = 'BI00018';
